title: Circular To All Prospective Capital Market Operators On Q1 2026 Pre-Registration Training And Examination
text:
The Securities and Exchange Commission (the Commission) hereby notifies all applicants for registration as Capital Market Operators that the next cycle of the pre-registration training and examination is scheduled to commence on Monday, March 2, 2026 . Eligible applicants are as follows:

i. Applicants who were invited but did not attend the pre-registration training conducted in November, 2025;

ii. Applicants who participated in the November, 2025 training but did not pass the pre-registration examination; and

iii. Other applicants who have satisfied the requirements for participating in pre-registration training.

Participation in the pre-registration training and examination is subject to the completion of the registration process on the designated application portal, as specified in the email notification forwarded by the Commission to each eligible applicant.

Please note that the registration process on the designated portal is expected to be completed on or before Friday, February 27, 2026.

The Commission wishes to remind applicants that, in line with SEC Rule 3(6)(b), any registration application will expire if the applicant fails to satisfy the stated registration requirements within twelve (12) months of submission. In such cases, the applicant will be required to submit a new registration application.

For further enquiries or clarifications on the above, please contact:

Email: registration@sec.gov.ng

1. 08023505251- Zainab Etsu

2. 08023263398- Chuks Ojugbana
